testimonials.quote: Marsha and the Core Collective team made selling our North Raleigh home an absolute breeze. Listed on Thursday, had seven offers by Sunday, and closed $68K above asking.
As a first-time buyer navigating a brutal market, Sharon was invaluable. She knew every neighborhood, every listing before it went live, and fought hard for our family.
Dexter helped me acquire three investment properties in 18 months. His market analysis is sharp, his network is exceptional, and his deal-making ability is second to none.
Sylvia guided us through a complex relocation from Chicago with zero stress. Her knowledge of Chapel Hill neighborhoods and school districts was exactly what we needed.
